title: 2023 DPA Experience & Salary Growth Analysis
summary: Salaries grow steadily with experience, increasing an average of S$10,839 per year of design experience. Management track pays more overall with more experienced designers filling those roles. International working experience translates to 85.5% higher median salaries and greater career progression. Designers with overseas experience have more average years of design experience (7.1 vs 4.4 years for locals). Negotiation has more impact at mid-to-late career stages: leads and managers see 10-16% increases, and those with 7+ years experience see 11-22% more when they negotiate. Median total compensation by years of design experience (Singapore respondents, SGD): 0-3 years S$62,700 (n=98); 4-6 years S$96,000 (n=55); 7-9 years S$131,650 (n=38); 10+ years S$156,100 (n=32). Median total compensation by negotiation response within each band (negotiated versus did not negotiate): 0-3 years S$56,275 versus S$65,100; 4-6 years S$72,000 versus S$106,600; 7-9 years S$137,500 versus S$112,800; 10+ years S$159,000 versus S$143,500. Per-cell sample sizes for the negotiation-by-YOE breakdown are not separately published; only the YOE-band totals above are reported.
methodology: Analysis of compensation data correlated with years of design experience (YOE), overseas experience, and negotiation behaviour among Singapore respondents. Salary growth rate derived from linear regression of median compensation against YOE brackets. Analysis limited to Singapore due to sample size constraints in other markets.
